meta.title: PurrPoint | PDF to Editable PPTX — No More Manual Reformatting
meta.description: PurrPoint is a Mac-native PDF-to-PPTX converter built for consultants, educators, and AI power users. 100% offline. Every text box fully editable.

pain.h2: Sound familiar? You're losing hours to problems that shouldn't exist.
pain.card_h3: Selectable text in a PDF doesn't mean you can edit it after conversion
pain.digital_desc: Text is properly encoded — output is directly editable
pain.scan_desc: Text is actually an image. macOS auto-OCR makes it look selectable, but conversions break
pain.p1_title: Paste it in — and the layout explodes
pain.p1_desc: Screenshot, paste, realign, fix fonts — editing a 15-slide deck can eat an entire afternoon.
pain.p2_title: AI slides you can't upload anywhere
pain.p2_desc: Your AI-generated slides contain your work. Upload to a random web tool and you've lost control of where it goes.

audience.i1_hook: Your AI-generated PDF analysis — and now you have to repaste it into slides?
audience.i1_scenario: → Convert your polished PDF reports directly into editable slides. Tweak numbers, restructure decks — no reformatting.
audience.i2_hook: Every minor update to your course slides means rebuilding the whole deck?
audience.i2_scenario: → Turn AI-generated course PDFs into editable PPTX. Fix a typo, add a note — no starting from scratch.
audience.i3_hook: NotebookLM built you a slide deck — and you can't change a single word?
audience.i3_scenario: → AI-output slides look selectable but are actually images. PurrPoint restores every character in place. Fix a word in under five seconds.

workflow.before_text: PDF → Screenshot → Paste into PPT → Align manually → Fix fonts → Fix layout → Half your afternoon: gone
workflow.after_text: Drop it in → Wait 30 seconds → Every word is editable
workflow.step1_desc: Drag your PDF into the app. Batch multi-page files supported.
workflow.step2_desc: Apple Vision OCR detects text and maps every character to its original coordinates.
workflow.step3_desc: Get a fully editable .pptx with layout intact — pixel-perfect positioning.

features.f3_desc: Fine-tuned for common line-break and punctuation issues in AI-generated Chinese slides — minimal manual cleanup after conversion.
features.f4_desc: The same Apple Vision tech behind iPhone card scanning and macOS Live Text — PurrPoint uses it to restore your slide text, positioned exactly where it was.
features.f5_title: No AI API calls — zero token cost, zero data exposure
features.f5_desc: The conversion never calls any generative AI model or external API. Your document is processed entirely on your Mac — no token fees per conversion, and no risk of your data being sent anywhere.

faq.q1: Can I freely edit the converted text?
faq.a1: Yes. Every text block is converted into an independent text box, positioned 1:1 with the original PDF. You can click and edit directly in PowerPoint or Keynote.
faq.q2: Does the app require an internet connection?
faq.a2: Not at all. PurrPoint runs 100% locally. All OCR and conversion processing happens on your Mac — no files are ever uploaded anywhere.
faq.q3: Do future versions cost extra after a one-time purchase?
faq.a3: No. The Founding Member Lifetime plan includes lifetime core maintenance updates — core conversion works forever.
faq.q4: macOS says it 'cannot verify the developer' when I open it. What do I do?
faq.a4_html: This is normal. In Finder, locate PurrPoint.app, then right-click → Open. Click Open again in the dialog. You won't see this warning again after that.
faq.q5: Can I edit charts (bar charts, pie charts) in the output?
faq.a5_html: Charts are preserved as images in the PPTX, positioned where they appeared in the PDF — but chart data cannot be edited. To change chart numbers, recreate the chart in PowerPoint. Text labels (titles, captions) are still fully editable.
faq.a7: OCR accuracy depends on the source PDF quality, scan resolution, and font complexity — occasional character recognition errors can occur. This is exactly why we offer a free 10-page trial: test with your actual document first and make sure the results meet your needs before buying.
faq.q6: When can I start testing? What if I'm not satisfied after buying?
faq.a6: Founding member registration is open now — drop your email to get a beta invite the moment we launch, with early access to the 10-page free trial and 14-day full version. We recommend trying it fully before committing — 14 days is plenty to evaluate every core feature.
faq.final_h2: Done with manual reformatting — for good
faq.final_sub: Next time you hit a PDF you can't edit, you'll know exactly what to do.
faq.final_note: Now open for registration · NT$500 off for the first 100 survey respondents

about.slogan: Get a cat. Stretch. Eat well. Sleep well.
about.story: One day I used NotebookLM to generate a seven-page slide deck. One page had a character — "醫" (medicine) — misrecognized as something else. Everything else was fine. I just wanted to fix that one character. But PPT wouldn't let me edit it. I didn't want to go back and forth with the AI — afraid a whole new set of errors would show up. I just wanted to open the file, fix the word, and get on with my life. So I built PurrPoint.

footer.slogan: Get a cat. Stretch. Eat well. Sleep well.
footer.legal: PurrPoint is a PDF format conversion tool that helps users work with documents they lawfully own. Users are responsible for ensuring they have the legal right to use or modify any file they convert. This software does not condone copyright infringement of any kind.
